text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There were two equal possibilities in that hospital
room.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Top or bottom. Left or right. Front or back. Light
or shadow. Both outcomes equally likely.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega?
text_block_list.text: So it could have been me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega?
text_block_list.text: To survive. To live on. To roam freely.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: It could have been me. Right, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Cloaked Figure
text_block_list.text:
It's time. The Kikuka Sho is about to begin. Come.
Approach the race track.

text_block_list.name: Cloaked Figure
text_block_list.text:
Approach the track.
Approach the track.
Approach the track.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
People wearing dark blue robes and orange masks
fill the room, forcing me out.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
A long line stretches forward, leading to the turf
of Yodo, where the Kikuka Sho awaits. They take
me. They carry me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Until finally, I realize...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This is a funeral.

text_block_list.name: Caster?
text_block_list.text:
An incredible victory by ———! It's ———! Kyoto
Racecourse is roaring with cheers!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: How fun! That was amazing! Oh...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: But why?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Why haven't you made up for what you did?

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text:
You know, if you don't use everything I gave you
properly, I'm going to take all of it back.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text:
Your body, your legs, your mind, your soul... your
life.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Give it all back to me. Give everything back.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: If you say you can't...

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Sister?
text_block_list.text: Then at least come down to where I am, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A sharp pain shoots through my left leg.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's the thirty-eighth time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Since the night of that new moon, I've been
having the same exact dream.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I can't wake up.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(On the twelfth night, I brought it up with Curren,
and it turned into a fight.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(She said dreams were just dreams, and the
person I saw wasn't my sister. But... how would she
know?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean... even I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
How could I? Her voice, her body, her life—all of
it is gone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Because I stole everything from her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since summer camp ended, Admire Vega has
been acting rather strange.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she hasn't been sleeping well. She looks
pale and seems increasingly anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm ready.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Unless there's anything else, I'm heading off to
the paddock.
choice_data_list:
Wait a second. You don't seem like you're
doing very well, and I—

...Wait a second. You don't seem like you're
doing very well, and I—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I just need to do what needs to be done. It
doesn't matter what race it is... or who I'm up
against.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On top of all that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have lost the passion for racing she
had in the Satsuki Sho and the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sounds like our conversation's done.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: See you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my desperate call, Admire Vega doesn't
stop.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Everything is fine.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I won't forget. I won't run away—never again.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I'll never race for myself again.)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh! I believe I might choke.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How thick it is, this stench of darkness, even
amongst the stars who shine their brightest at
night.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But there is no denying that she dazzles like no
other.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Narita Top Road, is your warpaint on?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
...If you're asking if I'm ready to race, Opera O,
then yes.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe never tells me anything, no matter what's
happened to her or what she's going through.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't matter what kind of opponent she
is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I won't run away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The curtain rises on the Kikuka Sho.
